highlight: Industrial chain graph built in 7 days

subsections.title: Highlight Cards
content: - Industrial chain graph built in 7 days: 25x more efficient than the traditional 2-month process
- Graph accuracy reaches 89.32%: About 20% higher than traditional manual plus machine learning solutions
- Delivered by a team of only 2 people: Labor cost reduced by about 80%
- Covers 230 million industrial product records: Relationships among tens of millions of enterprises can be brought into unified analysis

subsections.title: 2.2 Classification Tags
content: **Industry**: Finance & Trade, Energy & Manufacturing
**Category**: Service, Operations
**Technology Category**: Large Language Model (LLM), Knowledge Graph (KG), Agent, Natural Language Processing (NLP), Named Entity Recognition, Relation Extraction, Visualization and Design

subsections.title: 2.3 Implementation Cycle
content: - Demo development: <=7 days

subsections.title: 2.4 Team Composition
content: - Demo phase: 1 industry analyst, 1 data validation specialist

subsections.title: 2.5 Business Pain Points
content: - Long construction cycle: Building a nationwide industrial chain graph traditionally takes 2 months and depends on extensive manual organization, making it difficult to respond quickly to changes in industrial dynamics

- Difficult data integration: Nationwide industrial data is scattered across official statistics, industry associations, commercial databases, and other channels, and heterogeneous data is difficult to integrate in a unified way

- Inaccurate relationship mining: Complex relationships such as upstream and downstream links, equity ownership, and technology cooperation rely on manual judgment, making it easy to miss key connections and potential risk points
- High maintenance cost: Industrial nodes and relationships continue to change with policy and market shifts, while traditional modes have long update cycles and high maintenance labor cost

subsections.title: 2.6 Core Functions
content: - Low-code template-based configuration: Provides 30+ industry graph templates and supports custom node types, relation rules, and visualization styles

- Intelligent graph generation: Automatically extracts industrial entities such as enterprises, products, and technologies, mines related relationships, and builds a "six-dimensional hierarchy" graph of resources - materials - components - products - services - data

- Dynamic visualization and interaction: Generates an interactive graph dashboard supporting geographic distribution layers, value-flow annotations, enterprise competition landscape display, node drill-down, and multidimensional filtering

- Intelligent analysis report export: Built-in capabilities for industrial chain value distribution, key node identification, and risk transmission simulation allow one-click export of industrial analysis reports and graph visualization files
- Rapid update iteration: Supports incremental data updates and automatic relation verification, enabling one full-graph update every week to respond to changes in industrial dynamics

subsections.title: 3.1.1 Reasons for Best Practice Selection
content: - More accurate graphs: Construction accuracy reaches 89.32%, about 20% higher than traditional manual plus machine learning solutions.
- Faster delivery: A national-scale industrial chain graph can be compressed from 2 months to 7 days, a 25x efficiency improvement.
- Lower cost: Delivery requires only a 2-person team, reducing labor cost by about 80%.
- More complete data: Covers 230 million industrial products and data from tens of millions of enterprises, making it suitable for industrial analysis and decision-making scenarios.

subsections.title: 3.1.4 Metrics
content: **Core Business Metrics**
- Graph construction cycle <=7 days: End-to-end time from data access to final graph delivery
- Entity coverage >=92%: Coverage ratio of core links, enterprises, products, and other entities in the target national industrial chain
- Relationship mining rate > 90%: Ratio of correctly mining upstream/downstream, cooperation, equity, and other relationships from the graph
- Data update response time < 24 hours: Time required to complete graph updates after new data or policy changes
- Analysis time for custom dimensions < 3 seconds: Response speed after users initiate analysis on specific dimensions such as regional distribution or technology routes
- Low-code configuration efficiency improvement > 80%: Efficiency improvement ratio for graph template configuration and adjustment compared with traditional coded development
**Core Technical Metrics**
- Entity extraction accuracy > 93%: Accuracy of industrial entity recognition and disambiguation based on large models
- Relation extraction F1 score > 91%: Comprehensive evaluation metric for mining complex industrial chain relationships
- Data integration success rate > 98%: Proportion of effective access to and integration of multi-source heterogeneous data
- Supported concurrent graph visualization users > 1000: User capacity for simultaneous online viewing and operation of the graph
